---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.home-shell .fade-up .fade-delay-1 style="width:100%; max-width:100%;"}
# Alexandros Karagiannis - Αλέξανδρος Καραγιάννης

## Statistical Analysis Portfolio

::: {style="margin-top:-6px; margin-bottom:14px; font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:600; color:#6b7280;"}
Applied Statistician specializing in Data Analysis & Visualization
:::

::: {style="margin-top:10px; margin-bottom:18px; font-size:1.13rem;"}
<strong>Alma mater:</strong> <a href="https://www.utoronto.ca" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">University of Toronto</a> · <a href="https://www.doukas.edu.gr/diethni-programmata/ib-diploma-programme/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Doukas School IB Department, Athens, Greece</a>
:::

::: home-blue-panel
::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-2}
```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; width:100%; overflow:visible;">
  <img src="profile.jpg" style="width:100%; max-width:360px; height:430px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:20px; display:block;" />

  <div style="width:170px; margin-top:10px; display:block; overflow:visible; line-height:0;">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 200 260" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block;">
      <rect x="25" y="18" width="150" height="18" rx="2" fill="#d9d9d9"/>
      <rect x="38" y="36" width="124" height="16" rx="2" fill="#cfcfcf"/>
      <rect x="48" y="52" width="104" height="12" rx="2" fill="#d6d6d6"/>
      <rect x="58" y="64" width="84" height="142" rx="8" fill="#eeeeee"/>
      <rect x="68" y="72" width="6" height="126" rx="3" fill="#d8d8d8"/>
      <rect x="82" y="72" width="6" height="126" rx="3" fill="#d8d8d8"/>
      <rect x="96" y="72" width="6" height="126" rx="3" fill="#d8d8d8"/>
      <rect x="110" y="72" width="6" height="126" rx="3" fill="#d8d8d8"/>
      <rect x="124" y="72" width="6" height="126" rx="3" fill="#d8d8d8"/>
      <rect x="45" y="206" width="110" height="16" rx="2" fill="#cfcfcf"/>
      <rect x="32" y="222" width="136" height="18" rx="2" fill="#d9d9d9"/>
      <rect x="20" y="240" width="160" height="14" rx="2" fill="#c3c3c3"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-3}
Welcome to my website.

I am a 4th year student at the University of Toronto studying Applied Statistics, Economics, and Politics, with a strong interest in data science and the application of statistical thinking to real-world questions.

This portfolio brings together selected academic and analytical work in order to show both my technical skills and my broader interest in using quantitative methods.
:::

::: {.home-quote-box .fade-up .fade-delay-4}
> **Ζητεῖν τὴν ἀλήθειαν**\
> *To seek the truth.*\
> This idea reflects the motivation behind my work: to move beyond surface-level numbers, understand the deeper story data can tell, and apply statistical reasoning thoughtfully in order to reach meaningful judgments.
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-5 style="margin-top: 1rem;"}
[View My Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .home-project-btn}
:::

::: {.social-icons .fade-up .fade-delay-5 style="margin-top:18px;"}
[{{< iconify fa6-brands github >}}](https://github.com/Alexander71747){target="_blank"} [{{< iconify fa6-brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexandros-karagiannis-340739263/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
